heading: View and Edit Additional Settings
body:
To view and edit these settings:**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo update the advanced configuration settings for one cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas clusters advancedSettings update <clusterName> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters advancedSettings update](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-advancedSettings-update).**Ui:**Atlas UITo view and edit these settings with the Atlas UI, open the
**More Configuration Options** under
**Additional Settings** in the cluster form.
